title: Essential services brought to remote communities
description: SARAH BAARTMAN NEWS - Sassa and the Sarah...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"SARAH BAARTMAN NEWS - Sassa and the Sarah Baartman District's Department of Social Development recently held a community outreach programme at Witmos Farm in the Blue Crane Local Municipality to bring essential social services to the people.","html":"SARAH BAARTMAN NEWS - Sassa and the Sarah Baartman District's Department of Social Development recently held a community outreach programme at Witmos Farm in the Blue Crane Local Municipality to bring essential social services to the people."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The aim of the Integrated Community Registration Outreach Programme, held on Thursday 21 August, was to address the significant challenge many rural and remote communities face to access these services."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This was done through outreach activities, registration campaigns, and community engagement initiative.","html":"This was done through outreach activities, registration campaigns, and community engagement initiative."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The outreach was supported by key stakeholders including the Department of Health, Home Affairs, IEC and banking institutions.","html":"The outreach was supported by key stakeholders including the Department of Health, Home Affairs, IEC and banking institutions."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Essential services brought to remote communities
